children.heading: Non-application of the Paperwork Reduction Act
children.label: a Non-application of the Paperwork Reduction Act
children.text: Chapter 35 of title 44 (commonly referred to as the “Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995”), shall not apply to the provisions of, and the amendments made by, this subtitle.1So in original.1

children.heading: Operating instructions or other guidance
children.label: b Operating instructions or other guidance
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary of Labor may issue any operating instructions or other guidance necessary to carry out the provisions of, or the amendments made by, this subtitle.
